CustomField.formula: Biz_Dev_Perm_Administration__r.FirstName &' '& Biz_Dev_Perm_Administration__r.LastName &','& Biz_Dev_Perm_Nursing__r.FirstName &' '& Biz_Dev_Perm_Nursing__r.LastName &','& Biz_Dev_Perm_Physician__r.FirstName &' '& Biz_Dev_Perm_Physician__r.LastName &','& Biz_Dev_Perm_Therapy__r.FirstName &' '& Biz_Dev_Perm_Therapy__r.LastName &','& Biz_Dev_Temp_Administration__r.FirstName &' '& Biz_Dev_Temp_Administration__r.LastName &','& Biz_Dev_Temp_Nursing__r.FirstName &' '& Biz_Dev_Temp_Nursing__r.LastName &','& Biz_Dev_Temp_Therapy__r.FirstName &' '& Biz_Dev_Temp_Therapy__r.LastName
CustomField.label: Biz Dev Rep List
